name: Eliot Geo Area Rug - Threshold™
description:
Accent your indoor decor with contemporary style with this Eliot Geo Area Rug from Threshold™. Showcasing a cool, distressed geometric pattern in warm earthy hues for a lived-in look and a woven construction for soft comfort underfoot, this gray area rug masterfully elevates your living space. With a low pile height that’s easy to clean and maintain, the rectangular rug brings style and comfort to even the highest-traffic areas of your home.

Threshold™: Looks like home, feels like you.
